---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '…'
2. Click on '…'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots. Include relevant container/server logs
(`docker compose logs reverb`) — redact any secrets first.

## Environment

- **Reverb version:** (from the footer, or `GET /api/v1/version`)
- **Deployment method:** Docker image / built from source
- **Library mode:** bundled Navidrome / external Subsonic
- **Reverse proxy (if any):** Caddy / nginx / Traefik / none
- **Browser & OS:** (e.g. Firefox 140 on Linux)

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — config, adapters in use, etc. (redact secrets).
